title: Stock futures are little changed after Dow posts new record close on potential U.S.-Iran deal: Live updates
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average hit new record highs following news of a potential U.S.-Iran diplomatic deal, signaling market optimism. Stock futures remain relatively stable as traders assess the implications of improved U.S.-Iran relations.
content: On Monday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average climbed to new intraday and closing records on a potential deal between the U.S. and Iran.

zh.title: 在美国与伊朗潜在协议推动下，道琼斯指数创历史新高后，股指期货变化不大：实时更新
zh.summary: 道琼斯工业平均指数在美国与伊朗潜在外交协议的推动下创造历史新高，显示市场乐观情绪。当交易员评估美伊关系改善的影响时，股指期货保持相对稳定。

title: People in China are watching the World Cup differently this time
summary: Chinese viewers face unique challenges watching the World Cup due to significant time zone differences and multiple streaming platform options. These factors are changing viewing habits and engagement patterns for this major sporting event in China.
content: A 12-hour-plus time difference and various streaming options are influencing how people in China watch the World Cup.

zh.title: 中国人这次观看世界杯的方式不同了
zh.summary: 由于时区差异大和多个流媒体平台选择众多，中国观众在观看世界杯时面临独特挑战。这些因素正在改变这一重大体育赛事在中国的观看习惯和参与模式。

title: US Air Force B-52 bomber crashes in California; 8-member crew presumed dead
summary: A U.S. Air Force B-52 Stratofortress bomber crashed shortly after takeoff from Edwards Air Force Base in California, with all eight crew members presumed dead. The incident marks a significant loss for the military and raises questions about flight safety procedures.
content: A U.S. Air Force B-52 Stratofortress bomber crashed on Monday shortly after takeoff from Edwards Air Force Base.

zh.title: 美国空军B-52轰炸机在加州坠毁；8名机组人员遇难
zh.summary: 美国空军B-52同温层堡垒轰炸机在加州爱德华兹空军基地起飞后不久坠毁，八名机组人员全部遇难。这次事故标志着军方的重大损失，并引发了对飞行安全程序的质疑。

title: Roku’s sale to Fox for $22 billion raises a big question
summary: Roku has agreed to be acquired by Fox in a $22 billion deal, prompting investor enthusiasm and pushing Roku's stock to a four-year high. The acquisition raises questions about the future of the streaming platform and competitive positioning in media.
content: Roku’s stock is rallying to a four-year high after agreeing to be bought by Fox in a deal valued at $22 billion.

zh.title: Roku被Fox以22亿美元收购引发重大疑问
zh.summary: Roku同意被Fox以22亿美元收购,投资者热情高涨,Roku股价创四年新高。此次收购引发了对流媒体平台前景和媒体行业竞争地位的疑问。

title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: Waiting for AI to lift the whole market
summary: China's economy is banking on artificial intelligence sectors to drive growth as traditional pillars like real estate and domestic consumption remain weak. The reliance on AI industries highlights structural challenges in China's broader economic recovery.
content: China's economy sees a lift from artificial intelligence-related industries, while real estate and domestic demand remain lackluster.

zh.title: CNBC《中国连接》通讯:等待人工智能提振整体市场
zh.summary: 中国经济期待人工智能产业驱动增长,而房地产和国内消费等传统支柱仍然疲软。对人工智能产业的依赖凸显了中国更广泛经济复苏中的结构性挑战。

title: Nvidia plans to raise at least $20 billion in its first debt sale since start of AI boom
summary: Nvidia is preparing its first major debt offering since 2021, targeting at least $20 billion as the AI boom-era chipmaker seeks to raise capital. The sale reflects Nvidia's massive growth and changing financing strategy since becoming an AI industry leader.
content: Nvidia is set to raise capital in a debt sale for the first time since 2021, when the chipmaker was a fraction of its current size.

zh.title: Nvidia计划自AI热潮以来首次债券发行募集至少200亿美元
zh.summary: Nvidia正在准备自2021年以来的首次重大债券发行,目标至少募集200亿美元,这家人工智能芯片制造商正在寻求融资。此次发行反映了Nvidia自成为AI行业领导者以来的巨大增长和融资战略的改变。

title: CFTC chair Selig defends decision to approve ‘perps’ in U.S.
summary: CFTC Chair Michael Selig defended the approval of perpetual futures contracts in the U.S., arguing that developing the new asset class domestically prevents it from shifting offshore. The decision reflects regulatory openness to cryptocurrency-derived financial instruments.
content: Michael Selig said that incumbents will always fear the future, but it's important to develop the new asset class domestically rather than only offshore.

zh.title: CFTC主席塞利格为批准美国"永续合约"的决定辩护
zh.summary: 美国商品期货交易委员会主席迈克尔·塞利格为在美国批准永续期货合约进行了辩护，辩称在国内发展这一新资产类别可防止其转向海外。该决定反映了监管部门对加密货币衍生金融工具的开放态度。

title: Here’s when gas prices will come down if the U.S. deal to end the Iran war pans out
summary: Gas prices remain near the $4 per gallon threshold, with potential relief dependent on a U.S.-Iran diplomatic resolution. A successful deal could reduce geopolitical tensions and ease oil supply concerns, potentially lowering fuel costs for consumers.
content: The average retail gasoline price was just above the psychologically significant $4-per-gallon mark on Monday.

zh.title: 如果美国解决伊朗战争的协议成功，汽油价格何时会下降
zh.summary: 汽油价格仍在每加仑4美元左右徘徊，潜在缓解取决于美国-伊朗外交解决。成功的协议可能会减少地缘政治紧张局势，缓解石油供应担忧，可能会降低消费者的燃料成本。

title: Options traders are bracing for a very busy week, with June ‘triple witching’ and launch of SpaceX contracts on deck
summary: Options traders expect significant volatility during a shortened trading week featuring June quadruple witching and SpaceX futures contract launches. Multiple market-moving events concentrated into limited trading days could create opportunities and risks for derivatives traders.
content: Options traders are bracing for what could be a very busy few days as a number of potentially market-moving developments are being crammed into a shortened four-day trading week.

zh.title: 期权交易员为繁忙的一周做准备，包括6月"四重魔法时刻"和SpaceX合约推出
zh.summary: 期权交易员预期在包含6月四重魔法时刻和SpaceX期货合约推出的缩短交易周内出现显著波动。多个引发市场波动的事件集中在有限的交易日内，可能会为衍生品交易员创造机会和风险。

title: I’m 55 and earn $100,000. Should I take a $2,900 monthly pension — or $2,200 with 3% annual hikes?
summary: A 55-year-old earning $100,000 faces a pension choice between a higher immediate monthly payment versus a lower amount with annual cost-of-living increases. The decision hinges on life expectancy, inflation expectations, and plans to work five more years.
content: “I plan to continue working until age 60.”

zh.title: 我55岁，年收入10万美元。我应该领取2900美元的月度养老金，还是选择2200美元但每年增长3%？
zh.summary: 一位年收入10万美元的55岁人士面临养老金选择：是领取更高的即期月度支付，还是选择较低但每年有生活成本调整的金额。这个决定取决于预期寿命、通货膨胀预期和再工作5年的计划。

title: This no-fee Amex checking account is offering a $300 bonus for a limited time — how to qualify
summary: American Express is offering a $300 promotional bonus for new Amex Rewards Checking account holders who meet deposit requirements by early August. The no-fee account presents an incentive for customers to switch or consolidate banking relationships.
content: Open a new Amex Rewards Checking account by July 30 and receive at least $7,500 in direct deposits within 90 days to earn a $300 bonus.

zh.title: 这个无费用美国运通支票账户限时提供300美元奖励——如何获得资格
zh.summary: 美国运通为新的美国运通奖励支票账户持有人提供300美元促销奖励，条件是在8月初前满足存款要求。这个无费用账户为客户切换或整合银行关系提供了激励。

title: ‘We own our home outright’: I am 67 and earn $100,000. Do I take my $30,000 Social Security now or wait?
summary: A 67-year-old with substantial retirement savings faces the critical decision of whether to claim $30,000 in annual Social Security benefits immediately or delay for higher future payments. The couple's strong financial position of $950,000 in liquid retirement assets influences the strategic timing decision.
content: “We have combined savings of $950,000 in retirement plans, Roth IRAs and Treasuries.”

zh.title: "我们拥有自己的房子"：我67岁，年收入10万美元。我现在领取3万美元的社会保障金还是等待？
zh.summary: 一位拥有大量退休储蓄的67岁人士面临关键决定：是立即领取年度3万美元的社会保障福利，还是延迟以获得更高的未来支付。该夫妇拥有95万美元流动退休资产的强大财务状况影响了申领时间的战略性决定。

title: Why Western Digital’s stock was the S&P 500’s biggest gainer on Monday
summary: Western Digital led S&P 500 gains as storage stocks attract investor attention amid optimism about pricing power and market demand. The rally reflects broader enthusiasm for data storage companies in an era of increasing computational needs.
content: Storage stocks are hot as investor appreciation builds for the companies’ pricing potential.

zh.title: 西部数据股票为何成为周一标普500指数的最大涨幅者
zh.summary: 随着存储类股票吸引投资者关注，西部数据领涨标普500指数，投资者对定价能力和市场需求持乐观态度。这场涨势反映了在计算需求不断增加的时代，数据存储公司整体受欢迎程度的提高。

title: This cybersecurity stock is up 80% since April. Joe Terranova says it's still a buy
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings has surged over 80% since April, and investor Joe Terranova maintains it remains attractive despite significant recent gains. Terranova believes the cybersecurity stock still has upside potential from current levels.
content: CrowdStrike Holdings still has room to run, even after soaring more than 80% since April 10, according to investor Joe Terranova.

zh.title: 这只网络安全股票自4月以来上涨80%。乔·特拉诺瓦说它仍然是买入的
zh.summary: 网络安全公司CrowdStrike自4月以来上涨超过80%，投资者乔·特拉诺瓦坚持认为尽管近期涨幅显著，但它仍具吸引力。特拉诺瓦相信这只网络安全股票从目前水平仍有上升潜力。

title: The Iran deal came just in time as Strategic Petroleum Reserve hits lowest level since 1983
summary: The U.S. Strategic Petroleum Reserve has fallen to its lowest level since 1983 as global oil inventories deplete from the Iran conflict, making the reported Iran deal particularly timely. The supply disruption highlights energy security concerns amid geopolitical tensions.
content: Oil executives have warned that global inventories are rapidly depleting due to the supply disruption triggered by the Iran war.

zh.title: 随着战略石油储备触及1983年以来的最低水平，伊朗协议恰逢其时
zh.summary: 由于伊朗冲突导致全球石油库存枯竭，美国战略石油储备已降至1983年以来的最低水平，这使得报告的伊朗协议尤其及时。供应中断凸显了地缘政治紧张局势中的能源安全问题。

title: Centene to offer buyouts to some employees as health insurer cuts costs
summary: Health insurer Centene is implementing a workforce reduction strategy through voluntary buyout offers as it seeks to control costs. The company has not disclosed the scope of the buyout program or its overall workforce reduction targets.
content: The health insurer Centene did not indicate to how many employees were offered buyouts or how much it is aiming to reduce its workforce.

zh.title: Centene向部分员工提供买断以削减成本
zh.summary: 健康保险公司Centene正在通过自愿买断方案实施劳动力缩减战略，以控制成本。该公司尚未披露买断计划的范围或总体劳动力缩减目标。

title: 'Mag 7' is no more, meet the 'FAB 10': Retail investors buy SpaceX in record numbers for their new portfolio plan
summary: SpaceX's trading debut attracted record retail investor interest, with $117 million in retail purchases representing 56% of all single-stock buying that day, signaling a shift in retail investment focus. This surge reflects broader portfolio diversification among retail investors away from traditional tech mega-cap stocks.
content: Single-stock retail buying was $117 million for SpaceX on its first day of trading, amounting to 56% of all retail purchases, Vanda Research found.

zh.title: "Mag 7"已成过去，认识"FAB 10"：散户投资者以创纪录数字购买SpaceX
zh.summary: SpaceX交易首日吸引了创纪录的散户投资者兴趣，散户购买金额1.17亿美元，占该日所有单只股票购买的56%，表明散户投资焦点的转变。这一激增反映了散户投资者投资组合的更广泛多样化，远离传统科技巨头股票。

title: How the Strait of Hormuz reopening could unfold if the U.S.-Iran deal is implemented
summary: If the U.S.-Iran deal is implemented, tanker traffic through the critical Strait of Hormuz could increase quickly, though analysts are uncertain whether volumes will fully recover to prewar levels. The potential reopening of this strategic chokepoint has significant implications for global oil supply and prices.
content: Tanker traffic through Hormuz could quickly increase but it is unclear whether transits will approach prewar levels, according to Kpler.

zh.title: 如果美伊协议得以实施，霍尔木兹海峡重新开放将如何展开
zh.summary: 如果美伊协议得以实施，通过关键的霍尔木兹海峡的油轮交通可能会迅速增加，尽管分析师对交易量是否会完全恢复到战前水平持不确定态度。这一战略咽喉点的潜在重新开放对全球石油供应和价格具有重大影响。

title: Oil prices fall about 5% as Iran deal is set to open Hormuz Strait
summary: Oil prices declined approximately 5% following completion of a deal with Iran that is expected to open the Hormuz Strait for increased shipping. The agreement, announced by Trump, signals improved relations and potential for increased oil supply, which could impact global energy markets and inflation expectations.
content: "The Deal with the Islamic Republic of Iran is now complete," Trump said in a Truth Social post.

zh.title: 伊朗协议预计将开放荷木兹海峡，油价下跌约5%
zh.summary: 在与伊朗完成协议后，油价下跌约5%，该协议预计将开放荷木兹海峡以增加航运。特朗普宣布的这一协议表示关系改善和油供应增加的潜力，这可能影响全球能源市场和通胀预期。

title: Gavin Newsom says Trump ordered DOJ to investigate him and his wife
summary: California Governor Gavin Newsom claims President Trump ordered the Department of Justice to investigate him and his wife, characterizing Trump as 'the most corrupt President in American history.' The allegation reflects escalating political tensions between the Trump administration and state-level Democratic leadership.
content: California Gov. Newsom called President Donald Trump "simply the most corrupt President in American history."

zh.title: 加文·纽森称特朗普命令司法部调查他和他的妻子
zh.summary: 加州州长加文·纽森声称总统特朗普命令司法部调查他和他的妻子，将特朗普描述为"美国历史上最腐败的总统"。该指控反映了特朗普政府与州级民主党领导层之间不断升级的政治紧张关系。

title: Micron bulls are getting even more optimistic about memory trends as earnings draw closer
summary: Analysts are increasingly bullish on Micron's memory chip business ahead of earnings, with some projecting the current memory upcycle could extend beyond a year despite already exceeding the length of recent cycles. This optimism reflects strong demand driven by AI and data center growth.
content: This memory upcycle has already been longer than recent ones, but one analyst thinks it can keep going for more than a year.

zh.title: 随着财报临近，美光公司的看涨者对内存趋势变得更加乐观
zh.summary: 在财报即将公布之际，分析师对美光的内存芯片业务越来越看涨，一些人预测当前内存周期可能会延续一年以上，尽管已经超过了最近周期的长度。这种乐观情绪反映了人工智能和数据中心增长驱动的强劲需求。

title: SpaceX’s stock jumps as the company reveals its IPO has raised another $10.7 billion
summary: SpaceX's stock surged after underwriters exercised their overallotment option, adding $10.7 billion to the already record-breaking IPO through 83 million additional shares. This increased capital injection demonstrates strong investor demand for the aerospace company's expansion initiatives.
content: Underwriters on the already record-breaking IPO exercised the option to buy another 83 million shares.

zh.title: SpaceX股价飙升，公司宣布IPO融资额外增加107亿美元
zh.summary: 在承销商行使超额配售权后，SpaceX股价飙升，通过额外的8300万股为已创纪录的IPO增加了107亿美元融资。这笔增加的资本注入表明投资者对该航天公司扩张计划的强劲需求。

title: Trump is giving Warsh room to reshape the Fed
summary: The new Federal Reserve chair is operating on a 'political honeymoon' with a president who has historically been critical of the Fed, suggesting potential support for significant policy changes at the central bank. This marks a notable shift in the administration's relationship with monetary policy.
content: The new Fed chair is on a political honeymoon with a U.S. president who has been the Fed's biggest opponent.

zh.title: 特朗普给沃什重塑美联储的空间
zh.summary: 新任美联储主席在与历来批评美联储的总统的"政治蜜月期"内运作，暗示对中央银行重大政策变化可能的支持。这标志着政府与货币政策关系的显著转变。

title: SpaceX IPO raised $10bn more than thought
summary: SpaceX's IPO ultimately raised $87.5 billion, exceeding initial expectations of $75 billion by $10 billion and setting new records for the aerospace industry. The higher-than-expected proceeds demonstrate exceptional investor appetite for the company.
content: The company's listing raised $87.5bn, compared with the $75bn it was initially thought.

zh.title: SpaceX IPO融资超预期，增加100亿美元
zh.summary: SpaceX的IPO最终融资875亿美元，比初期预期的750亿美元多出10亿美元，创造了航天工业的新纪录。超预期的融资证明了投资者对该公司的强劲需求。

title: Salesforce looks to strengthen its AI platform — plus, a positive note for J&J
summary: Salesforce is making strategic moves to strengthen its artificial intelligence platform capabilities. The development is highlighted in the Investing Club's regular market update covering notable moves in major stocks.
content: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

zh.title: Salesforce寻求加强其AI平台 — 以及对强生的好消息
zh.summary: Salesforce正在采取战略举措加强其人工智能平台能力。这一发展在投资俱乐部的定期市场更新中被强调，涵盖主要股票的重要动向。

title: The record-high Chase Sapphire Preferred bonus is back: Earn 100,000 bonus points amid major card changes
summary: The Chase Sapphire Preferred credit card is offering a record-high welcome bonus of 100,000 points as the company implements major changes to the card program. The promotion targets consumers seeking to maximize travel rewards.
content: The Chase Sapphire Preferred is one of the top options for anyone ready to get serious about earning travel rewards.

zh.title: 创纪录高额的Chase Sapphire Preferred奖励回归：在重大卡片变化中赚取100,000奖励积分
zh.summary: Chase Sapphire Preferred信用卡提供创纪录高额的100,000点欢迎奖励，因为该公司对卡片计划实施重大改变。该促销活动针对寻求最大化旅行奖励的消费者。

title: Anthropic to meet White House over AI tool suspension
summary: Anthropic has been called to an urgent White House meeting following the company's suspension of user access to newly released AI models. The meeting indicates regulatory or policy concerns requiring high-level discussions with government officials.
content: The sudden meeting was called after Anthropic had to block users from just-released AI models.

zh.title: Anthropic将与白宫会面讨论AI工具暂停事宜
zh.summary: 继该公司暂停用户访问新发布的AI模型之后，Anthropic被召唤到一个紧急的白宫会议。该会议表明存在需要与政府官员进行高层讨论的监管或政策问题。

title: How the World Cup spending boom is also an opportunity for income investors
summary: World Cup host cities have issued municipal bonds to finance infrastructure expansion needed for the tournament, creating investment opportunities for income-focused investors. Asset manager Nuveen has identified potential opportunities in these municipal bond offerings.
content: World Cup host cities turned to municipal bonds to finance the expanded infrastructure needed to accommodate the games. Where Nuveen sees opportunities.

zh.title: 世界杯支出热潮如何也为收入投资者创造了机遇
zh.summary: 世界杯东道主城市已发行市政债券以融资举办赛事所需的基础设施扩展，为收入聚焦的投资者创造了投资机会。资产管理公司Nuveen已确认了这些市政债券产品中的潜在机会。

title: AMD flirts with a $900 billion valuation after beefing up its memory technology
summary: AMD's stock has surged significantly, pushing the company's valuation toward $900 billion and surpassing JPMorgan Chase in market capitalization following advances in its memory technology. The gains reflect investor confidence in the semiconductor company's competitive positioning in the memory and AI sectors.
content: AMD’s stock is surging, with the company now worth more than JPMorgan Chase.

zh.title: AMD在增强内存技术后接近900亿美元估值
zh.summary: AMD股票大幅上涨，推动公司估值达到900亿美元，并在内存技术进步后超越摩根大通的市值。这些收益反映了投资者对这家半导体公司在内存和人工智能领域竞争地位的信心。

title: Anthropic to meet with Trump administration over Mythos dispute
summary: Anthropic received an export control directive requiring suspension of access to its latest AI models for foreign nationals and is meeting with the Trump administration to address this significant regulatory action. The dispute centers on compliance with U.S. export control policies.
content: Anthropic received an export control directive that ordered the company to suspend access to its latest AI models by any foreign national.

zh.title: Anthropic将与特朗普政府就Mythos纠纷举行会议
zh.summary: Anthropic收到出口管制指令，要求暂停外国国民对其最新人工智能模型的访问权限，并正与特朗普政府举行会议以应对这一重大监管行动。纠纷的中心是遵守美国出口管制政策。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: SpaceX, Roku, Tripadvisor, Ferrari & more
summary: Multiple major stocks experienced significant price movements during midday trading, including SpaceX, Roku, Tripadvisor, and Ferrari, reflecting market reactions to company developments and broader market trends. The volatility highlights ongoing investor reassessment across various sectors.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in midday trading.

zh.title: 股市午盘最大涨跌幅: SpaceX、Roku、Tripadvisor、法拉利及其他
zh.summary: 多只主要股票在午盘交易中经历了显著的价格波动，包括SpaceX、Roku、Tripadvisor和法拉利，反映了市场对公司发展和更广泛市场趋势的反应。这种波动性凸显了投资者在各个部门的持续重新评估。

title: Treasury yields slide as Iran deal drives rethink on Fed interest rate hikes
summary: The 10-year U.S. Treasury yield fell nearly 3 basis points to 4.457% as the Iran deal reduced inflation expectations and prompted market reassessment of Federal Reserve rate-hiking plans. Lower yields reflect revised market expectations for a potentially less aggressive monetary policy path.
content: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — fell almost 3 basis points to 4.457%.

zh.title: 伊朗协议推动联邦储备重新考虑加息之际，美国国债收益率下滑
zh.summary: 由于伊朗协议降低了通胀预期，促使市场重新评估美联储的加息计划，10年期美国国债收益率下跌近3个基点至4.457%。更低的收益率反映了市场对可能不那么激进的货币政策路径的修正预期。

title: Momentum is building for a breakout in bank stocks, says Katie Stockton
summary: Bank stocks are showing improving technical indicators as market leadership broadens beyond technology, according to Fairlead Strategies founder Katie Stockton. The shift suggests potential for accelerating gains in the financial sector following the technology-dominated market run.
content: Bank stocks are improving from a technical standpoint as market leadership broadens beyond technology, according to the founder of Fairlead Strategies.

zh.title: Katie Stockton表示银行股突破的势头正在积聚
zh.summary: 根据Fairlead Strategies创始人Katie Stockton的说法，随着市场领导力扩展到技术领域之外，银行股正在显示改善的技术指标。这种转变暗示在技术主导的市场运行之后，金融部门可能会加速上升。

title: How to work in retirement without seeing your Social Security checks slashed
summary: Workers claiming Social Security before full retirement age may face temporary withholdings if they continue working, but the withheld amounts are not permanently lost—they are eventually returned to the recipient.
content: Claiming benefits before full retirement age while keeping a job can trigger unexpected withholdings — but the money isn’t lost forever.

zh.title: 退休后如何继续工作而不被削减社会保障支票
zh.summary: 在达到完全退休年龄前申请社会保障的工作者如果继续工作，可能会面临临时扣款，但被扣款的金额不会永久丧失——最终会返还给受益人。

title: Need a credit-score boost? Call your credit-card company and ask for this — but proceed with caution.
summary: Requesting a credit-limit increase from your credit-card company can improve your credit score by lowering your credit utilization ratio, though borrowers should proceed cautiously to avoid increased debt temptation.
content: A credit-limit increase can help strained borrowers improve how their financial picture looks on paper.

zh.title: 需要提高信用分数？请致电您的信用卡公司并要求这个——但要谨慎行事
zh.summary: 向您的信用卡公司申请提高信用额度可以通过降低您的信用使用率来改善您的信用分数，但借款人应谨慎行事，以避免增加债务诱惑。

title: Fox to buy streaming device maker Roku for $22 billion
summary: Fox has agreed to acquire streaming device maker Roku for approximately $22 billion in enterprise value, combining its news and sports networks with a prominent streaming platform.
content: Fox, the owner of the news and sports networks, said it has reached a deal to acquire Roku for about $22 billion in enterprise value.

zh.title: 福克斯以220亿美元收购流媒体设备制造商Roku
zh.summary: 福克斯同意以约220亿美元的企业价值收购流媒体设备制造商Roku，将其新闻和体育网络与一个主要的流媒体平台相结合。

title: We're adding to our position in a consumer bank that benefits from lower oil prices
summary: An investment firm is increasing its position in a consumer bank expected to benefit from lower oil prices following geopolitical developments, reversing earlier weakness driven by credit concerns.
content: Concerns about consumer credit have weighed on this stock since the Iran war began.

zh.title: 我们加大了在一家受益于低油价的消费银行中的投资头寸
zh.summary: 一家投资公司正在增加其对一家消费银行的投资头寸，该银行预计将从地缘政治事件导致的油价下跌中受益，这是对之前因信贷担忧而造成的下跌的反转。

title: These stocks have been beating the S&P 500 and could keep the bull market going, says Morgan Stanley
summary: Morgan Stanley has identified specific stocks outperforming the S&P 500 that could sustain the current bull market, despite headwinds from peak earnings revisions and liquidity concerns.
content: The bull market for stocks has been dogged by  peak earnings revisions breadth and peak liquidity, but fear not says Morgan Stanley.

zh.title: 摩根士丹利表示：这些股票一直跑赢标普500指数，可能延续牛市
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利已识别出特定股票的表现优于标普500指数，这些股票可能维持当前牛市，尽管面临收益见顶和流动性担忧带来的逆风。

title: Fox to buy Roku streaming firm in $22bn deal
summary: Fox's $22 billion acquisition of Roku represents a strategic bet that integrating streaming technology with its established news and sports offerings will attract audiences migrating online.
content: The move is seen as a bet that combining streaming with its news and sport offering will boost Fox as TV audiences move online.

zh.title: 福克斯以220亿美元收购Roku流媒体公司
zh.summary: 福克斯以220亿美元收购Roku，该交易代表了一项战略性赌注，即将流媒体技术与其既有的新闻和体育产品整合，将吸引迁往在线的观众。

title: Strait of Hormuz traffic to return to normal as soon as August, Kalshi traders speculate
summary: Prediction market traders are assigning better-than-50% odds that shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz will normalize before August, following recent geopolitical developments.
content: Odds that the Strait of Hormuz traffic will return to normal before August surpassed 50%, following U.S. President Donald Trump's announcement.

zh.title: 霍尔木兹海峡交通预计8月恢复正常，Kalshi交易员推测
zh.summary: 预测市场交易员认为，在最近地缘政治事态发展之后，霍尔木兹海峡的航运交通将在8月之前恢复正常的概率超过50%。

title: Salesforce to buy AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6 billion to boost agentic offerings
summary: Salesforce is acquiring AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6 billion to expand its agentic AI capabilities as enterprises increasingly demand automated customer service solutions.
content: Businesses are accelerating their agentic offerings for enterprises as competition heats up.

zh.title: Salesforce以36亿美元收购AI客户服务平台Fin以增强其代理AI产品
zh.summary: Salesforce正在以36亿美元收购AI客户服务平台Fin，以扩展其代理AI能力，因为企业越来越需要自动化的客户服务解决方案。

title: I’m spending $170,000 to upgrade my home for my aging parents. Can I get tax breaks?
summary: A homeowner investing $170,000 in home modifications for elderly parents explores potential tax deductions, particularly for improvements that accommodate disability-related needs.
content: “Given that at least half of the remodeling cost is to accommodate my disabled mother, I’m wondering if some of this may be tax deductible.”

zh.title: 我正在花17万美元升级住宅以照顾年迈父母。我能获得税收减免吗？
zh.summary: 一位房主投资17万美元对住宅进行改造以适应年迈父母的需求，并探索潜在的税收扣减，特别是针对与残障相关改造的扣减。

title: Warsh's Fed is likely to hold rates steady — what the leadership change could mean for your money
summary: New Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh is expected to hold interest rates steady at his first June meeting, with implications for consumer borrowing and savings rates going forward.
content: The Federal Reserve's June meeting, the first helmed by new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh, may impact many consumer borrowing and savings rates down the road.

zh.title: 沃什的美联储可能维持利率稳定——领导层变化对你的财务意味着什么
zh.summary: 新任美联储主席凯文·沃什预计将在6月首次会议上维持利率稳定,对消费者借贷和储蓄利率产生后续影响。

title: SpaceX gains 6% as it begins first full day of trading after record debut
summary: SpaceX rose 6% on its second day of trading following a record IPO debut, achieving a market valuation exceeding $2 trillion.
content: SpaceX is now valued at over $2 trillion after its stock rallied on the first day of trade.

zh.title: SpaceX上涨6%,创纪录IPO首日后开始首个完整交易日
zh.summary: SpaceX在创纪录IPO首日后的第二个交易日上涨6%,市场估值突破2万亿美元。

title: SpaceX IPO shines a light on the product set to disrupt Wall Street
summary: SpaceX's IPO demonstrates how perpetual futures markets provided early trading signals that closely aligned with later stock market prices, highlighting alternative venues disrupting traditional Wall Street.
content: Perp market traders had a form of early access to SpaceX, and the trading closely aligned with later prices in the stock market.

zh.title: SpaceX IPO揭示了可能颠覆华尔街的产品
zh.summary: SpaceX的IPO展示了永续期货市场如何提供与后续股票市场价格密切相符的早期交易信号,突显了颠覆传统华尔街的替代交易场所。

title: Fiserv CEO flees after presiding over 71% stock drop in his short tenure
summary: Fiserv's CEO is departing after the company's stock plummeted 71% during his brief tenure, with analysts criticizing the company's lack of strategic direction.
content: The financial-services company “continues to look strategically adrift,” an analyst says, as the stock falls further.

zh.title: Fiserv首席执行官因任期内股价暴跌71%而离职
zh.summary: Fiserv首席执行官因公司股价在其短期任职期间暴跌71%而即将离职，分析师批评该公司缺乏战略方向。

title: Oil prices retreat to $80 a barrel after U.S. and Iran agree to a framework for peace
summary: Oil prices retreated to $80 per barrel following a U.S.-Iran peace agreement framework, pushing U.S. gasoline prices below $4 per gallon on a national average basis.
content: U.S. gas prices dipped below $4 a gallon on Monday, based on GasBuddy’s national average.

zh.title: 美国与伊朗同意和平框架后油价回落至80美元/桶
zh.summary: 在美国与伊朗达成和平协议框架后，油价回落至每桶80美元，推动美国汽油价格在全国平均水平上跌破每加仑4美元。

title: KFC leans into boneless chicken, new drinks as chain tries to regain market share
summary: KFC is introducing boneless chicken options and new beverages to compete for market share amid intense competition in the rapidly growing global chicken market.
content: KFC is facing more competition from legacy giants and upstarts alike, thanks to the growing global popularity of chicken.

zh.title: 肯德基推出无骨鸡和新饮品以重振市场份额
zh.summary: 肯德基推出无骨鸡选项和新饮品，以在全球快速增长的鸡肉市场中竞争和夺回市场份额。

title: UK to ban social media for under-16s to 'give kids their childhood back'
summary: The UK is planning to ban social media access for under-16s to protect childhood development. The ban would encompass major platforms including TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, Snapchat, and X.
content: The ban could include platforms like Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook and X.

zh.title: 英国禁止16岁以下未成年人使用社交媒体以'让孩子重拾童年'
zh.summary: 英国计划禁止16岁以下的未成年人访问社交媒体以保护儿童发展。该禁令将涵盖包括抖音、Instagram、Facebook、YouTube、Snapchat和X在内的主要平台。

title: SoftBank surges more than 10% as Iran-U.S. deal sends Asia tech stocks soaring
summary: SoftBank shares surged over 10% as an Iran-U.S. peace deal sparked a broader rally in Asian tech stocks. The agreement signals potential relief for market volatility and investor sentiment.
content: Asian tech stocks surged Monday on news that Iran and the U.S. have reached a deal.

zh.title: 伊朗-美国协议激发亚洲科技股飙升，软银股价涨幅超10%
zh.summary: 伊朗-美国和平协议引发亚洲科技股广泛上涨，软银股价涨幅超过10%。该协议预示市场波动和投资者信心可能会缓解。

title: Trump says France must scrap tech 'sales tax' or face 100% wine tariffs: NY Post
summary: President Trump threatened 100% tariffs on French wine if France doesn't eliminate its digital services tax ahead of the G7 summit. The ultimatum signals escalating trade tensions between the U.S. and France.
content: President Donald Trump issued the threat ahead of this week's G7 summit in Évian-les-Bains, France.

zh.title: 特朗普称法国必须取消科技'销售税'，否则将面临100%葡萄酒关税
zh.summary: 特朗普总统威胁说，如果法国不在七国集团峰会前取消数字服务税，将对法国葡萄酒征收100%的关税。这一最后通牒表明美国和法国之间贸易紧张局势升级。

title: CNBC Daily Open: Iran deal fuels global relief rally
summary: An Iran peace deal has triggered a global stock market rally as investors anticipate relief from the energy crisis. The agreement offers hope for easing economic pressures linked to conflict-driven commodity volatility.
content: Iran peace deal sparks a global relief rally in stocks amid hopes that the end of the war will ease the energy crisis impacting economies worldwide.

zh.title: CNBC每日开盘：伊朗协议推动全球救济性反弹
zh.summary: 伊朗和平协议引发全球股市反弹，因为投资者期待能源危机得到缓解。该协议为缓解与冲突驱动的商品波动相关的经济压力带来了希望。

title: Demand at baby bank 'has never been higher'
summary: A baby bank reports unprecedented demand as rising childcare costs force working families to seek financial assistance. The crisis highlights the affordability challenges facing parents across income levels.
content: The founder says rising childcare costs mean many of those they help are in work but struggling.

zh.title: 婴幼儿银行的需求"前所未有地高"
zh.summary: 随着托儿成本上升，工薪家庭被迫寻求财务援助，婴幼儿银行报告需求空前高涨。这场危机凸显了各收入水平的父母面临的承受能力挑战。

title: SpaceX: To the moon for investors or a bumpy ride? Here's what experts say
summary: SpaceX shares show early optimism from investors following the company's market debut. Experts debate whether the stock's initial performance signals sustained upside or faces headwinds ahead.
content: If the first day's share price is anything to go by, investors are still very optimistic on the stock.

zh.title: SpaceX：投资者的月球梦还是坎坷之路？专家怎么说
zh.summary: 在公司上市后，SpaceX股票显示出投资者的早期乐观情绪。专家们争论该股票的初期表现是否预示着持续上升还是面临未来阻力。

title: Markets cheer U.S.-Iran agreement, but some investors caution deal is yet to be signed
summary: Asian stocks rallied and oil prices fell Monday after the U.S. and Iran agreed to a peace deal to end nearly four months of conflict. Some investors urge caution as the agreement has not yet been formally signed.
content: Asian stocks rallied Monday while oil prices tumbled after the U.S. and Iran agreed to a peace deal aimed at ending nearly four months of conflict.

zh.title: 市场对美伊协议欢呼雀跃，但部分投资者警告交易尚未签署
zh.summary: 美国和伊朗同意达成和平协议以结束近四个月冲突后，亚洲股市周一上涨，油价下跌。部分投资者敦促谨慎，因为该协议尚未正式签署。

title: World leaders welcome U.S.-Iran deal as Europe signals sanctions relief, urges Hormuz reopening
summary: The United States and Iran have reached an agreement following more than three months of negotiations and military conflict that began in late February. The deal has prompted responses from world leaders and Europe, with sanctions relief being discussed. This resolution is significant as the months-long hostilities had disrupted global energy and commodities markets.
content: The agreement came after more than three months of stop-start negotiations and bouts of fighting since late February, roiling global energy and commodities markets.

zh.title: 世界领导人欢迎美伊协议，欧洲暗示解除制裁并敦促霍尔木兹海峡重新开放
zh.summary: 美国和伊朗在经过三个多月的谈判和从2月底开始的军事冲突后达成协议。该协议引发了世界领导人和欧洲的回应，并讨论了制裁解除问题。这一解决方案意义重大，因为数月的敌对行动扰乱了全球能源和商品市场。

title: Oil prices slide after Pakistan announces deal between US and Iran
summary: Oil prices have declined following an announcement of a peace agreement between the United States and Iran, which includes reopening the key Strait of Hormuz waterway. The deal, announced by U.S. President Donald Trump, brings relief to global energy markets that had been disrupted by the conflict.
content: Under the agreement, the key Strait of Hormuz waterway will be reopened, US President Donald Trump said.

zh.title: 巴基斯坦宣布美伊协议后油价下滑
zh.summary: 在美伊和平协议宣布后油价下跌，该协议包括重新开放关键的霍尔木兹海峡水道。由美国总统特朗普宣布的该协议为因冲突而受扰乱的全球能源市场带来了缓解。

title: Stock futures jump, oil prices fall as Trump says U.S. has reached peace deal with Iran
summary: President Donald Trump announced that the United States has reached a peace deal with Iran, ending months of hostilities that had shut the Strait of Hormuz and triggered a global oil shock. The announcement prompted stock-index futures to surge while oil prices fell, signaling market optimism about economic recovery.
content: Oil prices fell and U.S. stock-index futures jumped Sunday after President Donald Trump said the U.S. has agreed to a peace deal with Iran, apparently ending months of hostilities that shut the Strait of Hormuz and sent the global economy into an oil shock.

zh.title: 特朗普宣布与伊朗达成和平协议，股指期货上升油价下跌
zh.summary: 特朗普总统宣布美国与伊朗达成和平协议，结束了数月的敌对行动，这些行动导致霍尔木兹海峡关闭并引发全球油价冲击。该宣布促使股指期货飙升，油价下跌，表明市场对经济复苏的乐观情绪。

title: Stock futures jump after the U.S. and Iran reach a deal to end the war: Live updates
summary: The United States and Iran have reached an agreement to end their ongoing conflict. This development comes as the three major U.S. stock indexes are posting gains following a winning week.
content: The three major indexes are coming off a winning week.

zh.title: 美伊达成结束战争协议后股指期货上涨：实时更新
zh.summary: 美国和伊朗已达成协议结束其持续的冲突。在经过成功的一周后，三大美股指数正在上涨。
